theme_and_archetype.rationale: To fix the overwhelming UI (1500+ lines, 13+ tabs), we must switch to a highly structured, cardless 'Control Room' grid. We will preserve the company's precise colors (#2a777a, #f7620b) but elevate them using strict hierarchy. The goal is to reduce cognitive load by grouping navigation and using generous whitespace.

colors.usage_rules: Primary teal must be used exclusively for CTAs, active states, and focus rings. Never use it as a massive background fill. Accent Orange is for notification badges, 'Expiry' warnings, and urgent status chips. Error Red is for destructive actions. 95% of the UI should feel structural (monochrome) with these brand colors directing user attention.

font_classes.h1: font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900
font_classes.labels: font-sans text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-gray-500
font_classes.metrics: font-heading text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-gray-900

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Bento Grid. Dense but highly scannable.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use flat solid white backgrounds (#FFFFFF) with a delicate 1px border (border-gray-200). Avoid generic floating drop shadows. Maximum border-radius is 8px (rounded-lg).
spacing_and_layout.padding: Containers must use generous internal padding (p-6) to avoid text collision.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Fixed 280px left sidebar. MUST use a collapsible accordion structure to group the 13+ items into 4 main categories to fix the user's confusion.

navigation_strategy.solution_for_confusion: The primary issue is 'too many tabs and factors showing at once'. The fix is logical grouping using collapsibles.

component_strategy.rules: Never build raw HTML dropdowns or tabs. Use Shadcn components exclusively. Override the Shadcn 'Vercel-look' by forcing the primary brand color (#2a777a) on primary buttons and active indicators.
component_strategy.forms: Inputs must have a 1px border. Focus state MUST ring with the primary teal color (focus:ring-[#2a777a]/20 focus:border-[#2a777a]).
component_strategy.data_tables: Data tables are critical here. Keep them cardless. Use subtle hover states on rows. Remove vertical dividers. Status badges must use soft backgrounds with solid text (e.g., bg-[#f7620b]/10 text-[#f7620b]).
component_strategy.refactoring: The massive 1500-3200 line dashboards MUST be refactored into modular components. For example, extract the Sidebar, Header, StatCards, and Table views into separate .js files within a components directory. Do not write single files exceeding 500 lines.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on `#2a777a` meets WCAG AA standards. Ensure hover states change color visibly.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and major sections MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='admin-dashboard-sales-card'`).

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY these media URLs. NEVER use placeholder text. For logos and avatars, render them as responsive images.

image_urls.description: LEAMSS Official logo for the sidebar header
Professional avatar for case managers / admin profiles
